description_long: This lantern features a robust, angular metal frame with a reddish-brown finish, supporting four glass panels that form the main body. The glass panels are tinted blue and are intersected by decorative metal crossbars forming diamond shapes on each face. The lantern is topped with a wide, sloped metal roof and a small, square cap, from which a sturdy hanging loop extends upward. The base is broad and flat, providing stability and a sense of weight. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional craftsman or mission-style outdoor lanterns, suitable for urban streetscapes or park pathways. The materials and construction suggest durability and weather resistance, with a focus on both function and decorative appeal.
description: A craftsman-style lantern with a reddish-brown metal frame, blue-tinted glass panels, and diamond-shaped crossbars, topped by a sloped metal roof and hanging loop.
description_view_0: Front view showing the diamond-patterned crossbars on the blue glass panel and the full width of the sloped roof.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the depth of the lantern and the side profile of the roof and frame.
description_view_2: Rear view nearly identical to the front, with the same diamond crossbar pattern and glass panel visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the lantern's depth and the symmetry of its design.
